semantic.role: An architectural governance rule that enforces separation of concerns by prohibiting direct imports of database adapters from application services.
responsibilities: Defines the rule and its scope (applies to src/**/*.ts, excluding src/db/**)
Provides rationale for maintaining clean architecture boundaries
Specifies allowed alternatives like service abstractions or repository interfaces
outOfScope: Does not cover database access patterns within the database layer itself
Does not address specific implementation details of the database adapters
Does not prescribe how to implement abstractions or repository interfaces

English.purpose: This document establishes a rule to prevent direct imports from the database layer (src/db/*) in application services, ensuring clean architecture boundaries.
English.context_and_audience: Targeted at developers and architects working on the codebase, particularly those writing service-layer code. The rule helps maintain separation of concerns by requiring use of abstractions.
key_takeaways: Direct imports from src/db/* are prohibited in application services
Use service abstractions or repository interfaces instead
Rationale: keep domain boundaries clear and avoid coupling business logic to storage implementation

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了一条架构规则，禁止应用服务层直接导入数据库层（src/db/*），以确保清晰的架构边界。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向代码库的开发者与架构师，特别是编写服务层代码的人员。该规则通过要求使用抽象接口来保持关注点分离。
key_takeaways: 禁止在应用服务中直接导入 src/db/*
应使用服务抽象或仓储接口替代
原理：保持领域边界清晰，避免业务逻辑与存储实现耦合
